name: Events @ NDTC
subject: You won't want to miss these events!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
we’ve got some cool stuff coming up this week.
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter — With the Thanksgiving holiday behind us, we wanted to make sure you saw all the super exciting events we have coming up this week!

Whether you are wrapping up your campaign, preparing to run your next or first race, or preparing your local organization for the road ahead, we’ve got just the events for you!

Check them out:
---
[Do You Want to Run For Office? Tues., 12/1 @ 1:00pm ET:](https://t.dripemail2.) If running for office is in your future, this training is a must. We’ll cover all you need to know before you jump into your race, and even practice how to share the news with your supporters. Space is limited.
| [CLICK HERE TO RSVP](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
[How to Initiate Values-Based Conversations to Recruit Members Wed., 12/2 @ 1:00pm ET:](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiYm0xYmludXR6MTk5YThpa3lrYzMiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9ldmVudC9ob3ctdG8taW5pdGlhdGUtdmFsdWVzLWJhc2VkLWNvbnZlcnNhdGlvbnMtdG8tcmVjcnVpdC1tZW1iZXJzLTEyLTItMjAyMC8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZnVsbGxpc3RcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VkxUaW52aXRlXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0) Is your local Democratic or grassroots organization gearing up for the long haul? This training will help local leaders like you strategize to retain your election year volunteers and help you draft part of your new member recruitment strategy.
| [CLICK HERE TO RSVP](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiYm0xYmludXR6MTk5YThpa3lrYzMiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9ldmVudC9ob3ctdG8taW5pdGlhdGUtdmFsdWVzLWJhc2VkLWNvbnZlcnNhdGlvbnMtdG8tcmVjcnVpdC1tZW1iZXJzLTEyLTItMjAyMC8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RnVsbExpc3RcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VkxUSW52aXRlXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0)
---
[NDTC Weekly Virtual Q&A with NDTC CEO Kelly Dietrich Thurs., 12/3 @ 1:00pm - 2:00pm ET:](https://t.dripemail2.) Bring all of your burning 2020 post-election questions, and get answers directly from NDTC Founder and CEO Kelly Dietrich!
| [CLICK HERE TO RSVP](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
[How to Raise Money When You Can’t Meet in Person (Call Time) Thurs., 12/3 @ 8:00pm ET:](https://t.dripemail2.) Whether you’ve just won your race, you’re planning to run next year, or your local organization is trying to build on successes of 2020, one thing is for certain: you’re going to need to raise money. Join us for this training to sharpen your hard ask skills and explore your fundraising rolodex. Who knows, you might find a handful of new donors you’ve been missing!
| [CLICK HERE TO RSVP](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
— The NDTC Team
|
---
| | | |
---

body:
---

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 30, 2020 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS SUNDAY MORNING FUTURES TO DISCUSS THE STAKES OF HER SENATE RACE
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler joined Maria Bartiromo on Sunday Morning Futures yesterday to discuss the stakes of her runoff race that will determine which party controls the Senate. Senator Loeffler is fighting for the heart of America here in Georgia - and she is dedicating every effort to ensure we keep Georgia red and save our country on January 5th.
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DWDOibUUQLuo08JcBEnvfIjgjZ0ljuM7qRSI9ShBmUFGCb_pGFueJkjzbLGVQz8GS-PnT00hXEhq_C9JrnBJ-43dTX_2dd_tnK-gJ_U60_e_e6Bw3oHPwfueZBlRHupgmFoS6WDc0KCevxfr3f_j5kC05n8u2j3uVzY8Ckb779nLifza1WDMVg==&c=yORHHkYejQ-00_SaIvSvQ1OzysZ-GxHQoIyGqVjPyQ49RLo6-LFCxg==&ch=6admlKmJYqdUfofsF7ybJlDpOUm25XEtVwlfqHiBwS7d7RaEtKIFRA==) or on the photo below to watch the full interview:

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DWDOibUUQLuo08JcBEnvfIjgjZ0ljuM7qRSI9ShBmUFGCb_pGFueJkjzbLGVQz8GS-PnT00hXEhq_C9JrnBJ-43dTX_2dd_tnK-gJ_U60_e_e6Bw3oHPwfueZBlRHupgmFoS6WDc0KCevxfr3f_j5kC05n8u2j3uVzY8Ckb779nLifza1WDMVg==&c=yORHHkYejQ-00_SaIvSvQ1OzysZ-GxHQoIyGqVjPyQ49RLo6-LFCxg==&ch=6admlKmJYqdUfofsF7ybJlDpOUm25XEtVwlfqHiBwS7d7RaEtKIFRA==)
---
| View an excerpt of Senator Loeffler's interview below:
"Look, everything's at stake in this election. The future of our country is on the ballot on January 5th right here in Georgia. We know what the stakes are. We know that if Chuck Schumer gets his way and says "now we take Georgia, then we change America," they would fundamentally and radically change America for the worst. We are not going to let that happen. We are the firewall to socialism - to stopping socialism in America right here in Georgia - and we're going to do that..."

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Soros is Pandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Journey PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "Liberal billionaires") Peter: **Liberal billionaires George Soros and Michael Bloomberg are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into Georgia to back Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the runoff elections.** They are doing this through a front group called Black PAC - the same PAC that tried every trick in the book to dupe Black Voters into voting against Donald Trump. **Their lying and pandering know no bounds. They are trying to trick Black voters AGAIN - I won't stand by and allow it to happen.** **Trump massively increased his share of Black voters compared to 2016 and Romney in 2012.[They failed in November, and with your help, we are going to make sure they fail in Georgia in January.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "They failed in November, and with your help, we are going to
make sure they fail in Georgia in January.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "Rush")My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, call screener and producer for radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I have worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I have learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. I started the New Journey because I figured it was time for a Black man to talk to the Black Community - not old white guys like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg who don't care about our community AT ALL. They see Black America trapped in a generations-long cycle of poverty and violence, and they want to keep it that way. **[I am showing Black America a new way, and I need your help to succeed so we can make Black America Republican again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "I am showing Black America a new way, and I need your help to succeed so we can make Black America Republican again.")** When the LEFT saw me, they were TERRIFIED, a proud Black Republican, standing up to show the Black Community a new way forward. We ran thousands of ads across the nation supporting Black Republicans for Congress, and we had an outstanding year. **[Now, we are 100% focused on winning the 2 runoff elections in Georgia, and you NEED to stand with us to make history one more time.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "Now, we are 100% focused on winning the 2 runoff elections in
Georgia, and you NEED to stand with us to make history one more time.")** These elections will decide which party controls the U.S. Senate. They are already trying to steal the White House - we can't allow them to steal the U.S. Senate as well. We have all seen what they will do to Black America if they control all branched of government. The Republican Party set African Americans free from slavery under President Abraham Lincoln's leadership, and the Democrats are the ones who supported the KKK, made their leaders, like the late Senator Robert Byrd (a friend of Joe Biden's), a leader within the Democrat Party, and then worked for generations to keep Black families dependent on the welfare state. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "Make Black America Republican Again")President Donald Trump did more for the Black Community during his presidency than Joe Biden has done in almost 50 years in government. Soros and Bloomberg tricked Black voters into voting for Democrats who then forget about these communities until the next election. **No more empty promises and pandering. Nancy Pelosi doesn 't get my support just because she put on a kente cloth - _she looks ridiculous and still doesn 't care about Black America._** The vote totals in 2020 proved it - Black America is becoming more and more Republican, but the radical left is on notice and will stop at nothing to stem the tide to keep their stranglehold on power through uninformed Black Voters. **[It all comes down to Georgia, and we can't win the race on the ground unless you stand by us and make a donation of $1,000, $50, $250, $100, or just $45 could make a big difference here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "It all comes down to Georgia,
and we can't win the race on the ground unless you stand by us and make a donation of $1,000, $50, $250, $100, or just $45 could make a big difference
here.")** I know you are tired, but we cannot stop fighting now - not until every legal vote is counted and 2 Republican senators are sworn into office. **[Please donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "Please donate today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56412224:JUcz1suIN:m:1:3206719985:552705FC8D8EE5289B3F9498A7270BC7:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC

body:
There's no easy way to say this... this will be the rematch of the decade and taking back the House Majority hinges on our success.

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001by0ydgdVbejQP-t5QdZrQaKEpL9fkpsKUjgZHuOUrIG90EtMsRkHd1A5fjTY0DGxIh1ItXTre9QgT9kYpOw2T5MZ9eJzGbInVVQ7uQUbGNb-0LrUlxDmmQtRU9Ffd3elfFnXWHlROkD7pMO6rarScRoSGZlcOaTxu6jhqd6vDeeOShrVb_LIjuXAj45LY2RU17slAYj2xMRWpS8QEDLN1NmKMJ62_-R-I-qAxUtwYURsc8pCXPQFAJesIbvT4at2VPBJVVp1Qk0WGXY9dtH1kRzGMG9JID1iJ6lD-6lQ7aOdmGqfbHbcktL-9rsC3buDipNgayx4unv5y00enTJ5_ceQQodVpeoq80GyGJSbzHwaeOabO-avRh3L4lXZLEpqYrKMDut_1NL7uXV_WbrdGQ==&c=2JR7PXx7jy8v_bzEpnHwIXr5hctlirMyD4eOspsXqgLItSxF7JyYPw==&ch=Chz97gaDgLZtRaemdbsZtIelNyPwf-xwviQ5MXcM64qEhjXnCgMGXQ==) Friend,

We defeated Pelosi's candidate just a few weeks ago and he's already set his sights on a rematch in 2022. Flipping this seat from BLUE to RED was no easy feat and defending this seat from the Radical Left will be no easier. There's no easy way to say this... this will be the rematch of the decade and taking back the House Majority hinges on our success.

**That 's why it's absolutely critical we hit our end of month fundraising goal, and the deadline is just hours away. We still need to raise $5,011 by midnight tonight to make our mark -- [can I count on you to pitch in and defend this seat from the Radical Left?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001by0ydgdVbejQP-t5QdZrQaKEpL9fkpsKUjgZHuOUrIG90EtMsRkHd72tJJEhSfSasNnnya5OXkIEeNxSDOe5ylKf5063p6FxmONwUVIbAiETdyyhi3WvReIKaZIAlCIx1-f4CHrjJa86S4QuYCH1QNkZcQTZA98zB4VNTzYfDA2XXZcQONZipqnMffZ0ehPYIPNmDeJJr0exZz33dnjsVhyjnPrXv-W0WcQVMIzfdSwZ4mQ1CNOHHmwZwRpjNGK_7V8ooSEWtw_BlSXcnjSyA7x9fr4H7OaAKy6JPXTN96IvrA-TbtJjTFEttFAP3lGOVyV-07eDHO-xJp_v_AwJHX9OdDnhUVKOsZTktulS8zB3D0x5R7IVOZDdb9p7RZiPyHgi7gXc6kyXMDa-LgSTmQ==&c=2JR7PXx7jy8v_bzEpnHwIXr5hctlirMyD4eOspsXqgLItSxF7JyYPw==&ch=Chz97gaDgLZtRaemdbsZtIelNyPwf-xwviQ5MXcM64qEhjXnCgMGXQ==)**

Victory will come down to grassroots supporters like you. Winning this fight isn't just about one defending one seat -- it's about retaking the House Majority, the future of our nation, and putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda. **It 's about fighting for our conservative agenda, fighting against any new taxes, and stopping all tax increases. **

[**We will not win without your help and in an election as important as this, every little bit counts. Can we count on you to chip in $10, $5, or even just $1 to help take back the House Majority?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001by0ydgdVbejQP-t5QdZrQaKEpL9fkpsKUjgZHuOUrIG90EtMsRkHd72tJJEhSfSasNnnya5OXkIEeNxSDOe5ylKf5063p6FxmONwUVIbAiETdyyhi3WvReIKaZIAlCIx1-f4CHrjJa86S4QuYCH1QNkZcQTZA98zB4VNTzYfDA2XXZcQONZipqnMffZ0ehPYIPNmDeJJr0exZz33dnjsVhyjnPrXv-W0WcQVMIzfdSwZ4mQ1CNOHHmwZwRpjNGK_7V8ooSEWtw_BlSXcnjSyA7x9fr4H7OaAKy6JPXTN96IvrA-TbtJjTFEttFAP3lGOVyV-07eDHO-xJp_v_AwJHX9OdDnhUVKOsZTktulS8zB3D0x5R7IVOZDdb9p7RZiPyHgi7gXc6kyXMDa-LgSTmQ==&c=2JR7PXx7jy8v_bzEpnHwIXr5hctlirMyD4eOspsXqgLItSxF7JyYPw==&ch=Chz97gaDgLZtRaemdbsZtIelNyPwf-xwviQ5MXcM64qEhjXnCgMGXQ==)

Nancy Pelosi spent millions to defeat us and the Left's dark money operation spent more against us than any other race in the nation. This time around will be no different. Especially not with the House Majority within reach.

Friend, your contribution will have a direct impact on the future of our campaign and it's going to be a fight to the finish: [**Can we count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to put us on the path to victory?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001by0ydgdVbejQP-t5QdZrQaKEpL9fkpsKUjgZHuOUrIG90EtMsRkHd72tJJEhSfSasNnnya5OXkIEeNxSDOe5ylKf5063p6FxmONwUVIbAiETdyyhi3WvReIKaZIAlCIx1-f4CHrjJa86S4QuYCH1QNkZcQTZA98zB4VNTzYfDA2XXZcQONZipqnMffZ0ehPYIPNmDeJJr0exZz33dnjsVhyjnPrXv-W0WcQVMIzfdSwZ4mQ1CNOHHmwZwRpjNGK_7V8ooSEWtw_BlSXcnjSyA7x9fr4H7OaAKy6JPXTN96IvrA-TbtJjTFEttFAP3lGOVyV-07eDHO-xJp_v_AwJHX9OdDnhUVKOsZTktulS8zB3D0x5R7IVOZDdb9p7RZiPyHgi7gXc6kyXMDa-LgSTmQ==&c=2JR7PXx7jy8v_bzEpnHwIXr5hctlirMyD4eOspsXqgLItSxF7JyYPw==&ch=Chz97gaDgLZtRaemdbsZtIelNyPwf-xwviQ5MXcM64qEhjXnCgMGXQ==)

clean_body: There's no easy way to say this... this will be the rematch of the decade and taking back the House Majority hinges on our success. . == Friend, We defeated Pelosi's candidate just a few weeks ago and he's already set his sights on a rematch in 2022. Flipping this seat from BLUE to RED was no easy feat and defending this seat from the Radical Left will be no easier. There's no easy way to say this... this will be the rematch of the decade and taking back the House Majority hinges on our success. That 's why it's absolutely critical we hit our end of month fundraising goal, and the deadline is just hours away. We still need to raise $5,011 by midnight tonight to make our mark -- == Victory will come down to grassroots supporters like you. Winning this fight isn't just about one defending one seat -- it's about retaking the House Majority, the future of our nation, and putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda. It 's about fighting for our conservative agenda, fighting against any new taxes, and stopping all tax increases. == Nancy Pelosi spent millions to defeat us and the Left's dark money operation spent more against us than any other race in the nation. This time around will be no different. Especially not with the House Majority within reach. Friend, defending this seat from Pelosi and the Far Left won't be easy, but it's 100% necessary --_the future of the House Majority hinges on this seat._

Once again we're facing one of the toughest races in the nation, and once again we're a top-target. The Left spent $20+ million attacking us over the last four years, and the attacks won't stop. That's why, as a valued member of our grassroots team, I'm asking for your help, just a few hours before our critical end of month deadline, to help take back the House for Republicans.

[**Can you chip in $10 before midnight tonight t o give conservative Californian**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uJrieYtfWU01kdz73zRrBHK5NnIThfP5Kd8dQ85hGBHIaLci6af4NrdksY-jE0r7cVmekVhCh3LH6b8nxQQZuq2oAQyYRaVnrOfNY3lVNr-SYro3-qpiTP0CblKuyJP0i9NGwOXS2kZYuiUCGwqul08PQ-EqjgWQHGovcXfpXe5113DLIyGE9SfvodOyaVxACBThzMZ6QZXAkWrs1ZZBcGZYwj7vC59ejyWg4wWfxV1ivBHkIdQw7el6AlW9uxJY43F4CTmXMHheYf34jhaPOXLnvvJ9ix1UzS5aEZDlgYjVuk1uruAm1ZsRBAVygiGCSKTWFAh2kjL565aCBCuEP7V0f7q7h8B1YavBn0xVAI39siThNIz1sXv9si16hFNQhk_zy7T9PT-XPDNOpvk5fsSoZxX7NVNmaeQ1ZkRMT--4LefYZsv4blzx20AoU-46&c=GZqYLBwEtKP_QQLssd-9iQ-9wl4QPpHY74DhYzD-_qmgQci_sx6rpw==&ch=Q4kub3kuk6PAr3CkZ6eaS56i48X_78mIGmjM7RNmRDS5EPxBIIhgyw==)[**s a voice and return common-sense leadership to Congress?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uJrieYtfWU01kdz73zRrBHK5NnIThfP5Kd8dQ85hGBHIaLci6af4NrdksY-jE0r7jqjMPkmHJpbPmdMmENwsoQ95zlzb_iQtxljV7FlpWiCEuY_0Xavf3EyIW0CxQLXgxn4n3MyVivtScwA6L-Xn4rDxlpGUc0dSVyl9SMN_BfJ2k4rfuRHHNomWf_nJMUbVuXFPhukKs7j2bZhvEUAso6vf5v-2Y1_w1-jaenUW9_KGXhCvd-gTHMCrqWTaRTYJm3MmHmrTkECEmcKtv4TAPrzM3frQBpCeWJbxXOjpigMpUgq2yGxiAFNqK1FdCAt46l9343zVJ0D8Fglp8vjidRCEczrpyntADOlfTftdcIJ-7gfpE0JXS-rKUMV1l1h4SFWWkrF1IcSLf8v5vbf6ARFAeI-Dwad0pJoGX1S41n4TZvpzTC6QXw==&c=GZqYLBwEtKP_QQLssd-9iQ-9wl4QPpHY74DhYzD-_qmgQci_sx6rpw==&ch=Q4kub3kuk6PAr3CkZ6eaS56i48X_78mIGmjM7RNmRDS5EPxBIIhgyw==) Your support is critical to taking back the House and putting an end to the Left's out of touch agenda.

As an immigrant and proud conservative woman, I'm fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. I've fought to solve issues of homelessness and affordability and will continue to fight for common-sense solutions.

_But I can 't do it alone._ Nancy Pelosi is determined to take back this seat and will spend whatever it takes to buy it out from under us. clean_body: Defending this seat from Pelosi and the Far Left won't be easy, but it's 100% necessary -- the future of the House Majority hinges on this seat. == Friend, defending this seat from Pelosi and the Far Left won't be easy, but it's 100% necessary --the future of the House Majority hinges on this seat. Once again we're facing one of the toughest races in the nation, and once again we're a top-target. The Left spent $20+ million attacking us over the last four years, and the attacks won't stop. That's why, as a valued member of our grassroots team, I'm asking for your help, just a few hours before our critical end of month deadline, to help take back the House for Republicans. == Your support is critical to taking back the House and putting an end to the Left's out of touch agenda. As an immigrant and proud conservative woman, I'm fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. I've fought to solve issues of homelessness and affordability and will continue to fight for common-sense solutions. But I can 't do it alone. Nancy Pelosi is determined to take back this seat and will spend whatever it takes to buy it out from under us. We have to keep our momentum building and, with the House Majority within reach, we have no time to lose. == == | == == Like I said, I can't win this fight alone and our end of month deadline is tonight at midnight. Thank you, Young Kim During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --== Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 ==** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: RAPHAEL WARNOCK TRIVIALIZED THE OPIOID EPIDEMIC WITH RACIALLY CHARGED, ANTI-CAPITALIST RHETORIC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 30, 2020 RAPHAEL WARNOCK TRIVIALIZED THE OPIOID EPIDEMIC WITH RACIALLY CHARGED, ANTI-CAPITALIST RHETORIC
ATLANTA - Newly uncovered footage [reveals](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ug0rV7H2vaToIUQ3dCkN9P62bzOevvcZtoNty15DaFpgxoOrCWBXEXBlLA3SzD7WBLisEmfYkyHriPSSLihx04H1fZbfX06Xw3DS4_1n2Vx2WYZ56QWcM8_oZ3KascfeF7H679ZYogNZlFPZXo6clxEhEyhpMR1VBvPR0vcxQlxkClBnX_-M5HiIw0Epx2drdVnlAV2CV6RU7koEd5dozD1UwWpWBZDnSK5dGK-fsumjmfDv5oe9lJrw4lTZxA_IEZdoux77es49ZnrUE7BHZbADh32GofpFInwE4kbYCM1HH8QqiQxcUGMnppe4rIgW8lFErGBS3I=&c=vLRxsiuMLLaPPab_4EKjG50fCrouNmWUyTygL048igQDW609m0QSpQ==&ch=QFW2zDZV9gSehCw-u9IPi6XNOxMyVKqrJZS6a4_l2rzlq6IPCEjbdA==) that Raphael Warnock insulted the victims of the opioid epidemic, stating that the only reason this devastating crisis is considered a "public health emergency" is because "the faces of the human tragedy are white and suburban." Warnock then claimed that the epidemic exists because people are "self-medicating" to overcome the "spiritual sickness" of "religion garbed in the garments of capitalism."
Click the image below to watch the clip.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ug0rV7H2vaToIUQ3dCkN9P62bzOevvcZtoNty15DaFpgxoOrCWBXEXBlLA3SzD7KeJr7agE4orP-H06AjK2RAUeaj79-ggc7uCkgEpTHXTYoUNBzJ2WeegVUO9AUeE2H-5mveBY2YS9mbUGNzGqqt9SwCpPAIxtHHAjIVCp8132psodu7_goDFwzyvcuI9a5IVc2rjC5vqyJ2YyGGmWGFKR_fjwzUJ6Nb06xL4ncF5r2mxyTqccEA==&c=vLRxsiuMLLaPPab_4EKjG50fCrouNmWUyTygL048igQDW609m0QSpQ==&ch=QFW2zDZV9gSehCw-u9IPi6XNOxMyVKqrJZS6a4_l2rzlq6IPCEjbdA==)
---
| "Instead of taking a unifying stand to tackle one of the biggest crises plaguing our country, Raphael Warnock has again chosen to divide the people Georgia and trivialize the suffering of so many by attacking capitalism and using racially charged language," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "While Warnock blames the victims of the opioid epidemic and uses their tragedy to trash capitalism, Kelly Loeffler has taken action in the Senate to crack down on opioid trafficking. Unlike her opponent, she will continue taking this crisis seriously and fighting for additional resources to help combat this epidemic."
---
| BACKGROUND:
At His 2019 "Ending Mass Incarceration" Conference, Warnock Complained that the Opioid Crisis Is Being Treated as a "Public Health Emergency" Because "the Faces of the Human Tragedy Are White and Suburban" (Ebenezer Baptist Church, "Ending Mass Incarceration: Let My People Go," [Vimeo](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ug0rV7H2vaToIUQ3dCkN9P62bzOevvcZtoNty15DaFpgxoOrCWBXEXBlLA3SzD7I3kqfuiBgtyi7deU0SgWU88UtsZ1MmkqkPz00vglWStcqnpVQ2PNVGSe1Md3w9n4ve8A3luARVexJVui87CZM3tIOOwczWqHlahfCJrxV1LmUx8Si8gfL650f28SjjJpRdu1sVz2lb7aieeQ0OATOLT_ilvnK9nJjVcZ7fxiG0k=&c=vLRxsiuMLLaPPab_4EKjG50fCrouNmWUyTygL048igQDW609m0QSpQ==&ch=QFW2zDZV9gSehCw-u9IPi6XNOxMyVKqrJZS6a4_l2rzlq6IPCEjbdA==), 6/17/2019, Min. 59:50) - [VIDEO CLIP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ug0rV7H2vaToIUQ3dCkN9P62bzOevvcZtoNty15DaFpgxoOrCWBXEXBlLA3SzD7KeJr7agE4orP-H06AjK2RAUeaj79-ggc7uCkgEpTHXTYoUNBzJ2WeegVUO9AUeE2H-5mveBY2YS9mbUGNzGqqt9SwCpPAIxtHHAjIVCp8132psodu7_goDFwzyvcuI9a5IVc2rjC5vqyJ2YyGGmWGFKR_fjwzUJ6Nb06xL4ncF5r2mxyTqccEA==&c=vLRxsiuMLLaPPab_4EKjG50fCrouNmWUyTygL048igQDW609m0QSpQ==&ch=QFW2zDZV9gSehCw-u9IPi6XNOxMyVKqrJZS6a4_l2rzlq6IPCEjbdA==)

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Support My Faith Votes through Amazon Smile
body:
| | Make a difference while you shop! Peter, The Christmas shopping season is now in full swing. And today is Cyber Monday, the largest online shopping day of the year. Your inbox is probably getting flooded with advertisements from all the stores you’ve ever shopped at. But this year feels different because it’s been a difficult year for so many people impacted by the COVID-19 crisis. It may be causing you to think carefully about how you can stretch every dollar and make a positive difference through your purchases; whether it’s supporting a small business or supporting your favorite organizations. **We have a great opportunity for you to do your online shopping AND give to My Faith Votes at the same time.** If you plan to make any Amazon purchases this year, they have an awesome program called Amazon Smile. For every purchase you make on smile.amazon.com, the Amazon Smile Foundation will donate 0.5% to the charity of your choice! You can designate My Faith Votes as your charity of choice, and with each of your Amazon purchases this Cyber Monday, you will be helping us equip and motivate Christians to vote in the 2021 special Georgia Senate run-off elections. **I encourage you to take just a minute and connect your Amazon account to My Faith Votes.** Together, we will continue to awaken more Christians to the power of biblical principles and their votes! **Here are the quick steps to ensure your Amazon purchases are going to a worthwhile cause.** 1\. Go to [https://smile.amazon.com](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=LyHKSq4LmMvvu9B4HXC2Rort4mmJpjvXL_8yErLp7aI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201130com01&n=1) 2\. Type in “**My Faith Votes** ” as the organization of your choice 3\. Use the “**Select** ” button to choose My Faith Votes In order for the charity to receive the contribution from Amazon, you must make any Amazon purchase from [https://smile.amazon.com](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=LyHKSq4LmMvvu9B4HXC2Rort4mmJpjvXL_8yErLp7aI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201130com01&n=2). Amazon.com and Smile.Amazon.com are the same company **_with the same prices_**. **If you _already_ have an Amazon Smile Account and want to change your charity to My Faith Votes:**
1. Go to [https://smile.amazon.com](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=LyHKSq4LmMvvu9B4HXC2Rort4mmJpjvXL_8yErLp7aI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201130com01&n=3)
2. Click on “** _Account & Lists_**” from the drop-down menu select “Your Amazon Smile”
3. Click the “** _Change Your Charity_** ” button on the right side of your page
4. Type in “**My Faith Votes** ” as the organization of your choice
5. Use the “**Select** ” button to choose My Faith Votes

Thanks so much for taking the time to see your Amazon purchases make a difference in our country to advance biblical values. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201130com01&n=4)
---

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC Releases Two Ads Totaling Seven-Figures in GA
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: November 30, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Releases Two Ads Totaling Seven-Figures in Georgia
---
| Athens, GA \- Protect Freedom PAC, a Rand Paul affiliated Super PAC dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, announced that they will be running two ads in support of the Republican candidates in the Georgia Senate runoff elections.
The ads, titled "Lockdowns" and "Destroy," will together be a seven-figure buy and will begin today. Protect Freedom PAC is committed to spending $3 million dollars in Georgia for the runoff election.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lgGPMoeARrsIb6mlCStpfG22hbDIduKTUko5ZF8GfOD-AgyrcuZwOZK2JPjO6lxNqxISHn4ZWBo5R-J8v6a2XgV-1kt4lHS-AV3sOpbOUs1hG-YwNZumXfoMNWteRGrA_w7AZqv338R3iZ5ZJMIEyV_rTtzROES6_wyrz5m-zoZwyzO7xPaA1tsmmon6rCMzLrNF2HRWkQw=&c=JwPzaVmIJcqyVNOBQMIOhW8TBRwyejQotHwljdRde4tKscE6VhUlbQ==&ch=xA5Q1MI61Zwm0bHkLLPDTz3LLIh5SSO_dhuILOBKXDUtRCJAemabWg==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lgGPMoeARrsIb6mlCStpfG22hbDIduKTUko5ZF8GfOD-AgyrcuZwOZK2JPjO6lxNfyswpy1UfleT4pXVN1Im2LVIhcEfRVRUCszd6V9G0KLMl0mKhFt7nNvaXBekMRF0ypEH6ayVINaW2YlFKQClUg==&c=JwPzaVmIJcqyVNOBQMIOhW8TBRwyejQotHwljdRde4tKscE6VhUlbQ==&ch=xA5Q1MI61Zwm0bHkLLPDTz3LLIh5SSO_dhuILOBKXDUtRCJAemabWg==)
---
| Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Protect Freedom PAC, with the help of Senator Rand Paul, is proud to release two ads in Georgia today. Georgia is ground zero for the fight to control the Senate, and we are committed to putting the resources into these races to ensure victory. Radicals Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock put our very rights at risk - we must stand strong to defend what Republicans have built. Vote Republican on January 5th to defend and protect our liberty."
To view "Lockdowns," please click [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lgGPMoeARrsIb6mlCStpfG22hbDIduKTUko5ZF8GfOD-AgyrcuZwOZK2JPjO6lxNygUHMrIEC7bkakytefGVtj6xfIW4-PphoWo0XDC_KcQJuBycwcK9Bd5PQq5Tdqui7hhMyJ2E4hBI6TI7bA6-IA==&c=JwPzaVmIJcqyVNOBQMIOhW8TBRwyejQotHwljdRde4tKscE6VhUlbQ==&ch=xA5Q1MI61Zwm0bHkLLPDTz3LLIh5SSO_dhuILOBKXDUtRCJAemabWg==). To view "Destroy," please click [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lgGPMoeARrsIb6mlCStpfG22hbDIduKTUko5ZF8GfOD-AgyrcuZwOZK2JPjO6lxNfyswpy1UfleT4pXVN1Im2LVIhcEfRVRUCszd6V9G0KLMl0mKhFt7nNvaXBekMRF0ypEH6ayVINaW2YlFKQClUg==&c=JwPzaVmIJcqyVNOBQMIOhW8TBRwyejQotHwljdRde4tKscE6VhUlbQ==&ch=xA5Q1MI61Zwm0bHkLLPDTz3LLIh5SSO_dhuILOBKXDUtRCJAemabWg==).
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---

|

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: taking the next step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
And while we’ve got the strong leadership we need in Governor Holcomb, we still need you in the game to help us take that next step. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d853e94e7576420e9f20f730c44baa76&_e=O_H1HcWEIviD4Km6kgz8tVSEB1pP8EUqRB1u_lKJxpgYDFy9gNf6sDsHtSq7mbg76yVdHNzI7SLjPAcooGaMaFpBEUHOUW0hdZB3CFDixpqxmdODTXu0QTyfXi8CXMaY2vFXWdjIgu8Iht3gKpSxmv_Qlf_wfT5PxhmGkUH861FqLMM-YSXGfExokYP_rRQ-kDyevBlvxH3e2sikwVbeOHL9ktEiFWnfLZNoiJbu-Ep78-YCJpvo7L9gWkn5_l4AwqByYYkeQNp-tfGlAwsGobH4mrAtL6NMPXrSjvZwNGzzQh9nUCM5mknWBuW0qru_N7LGfPselgEZ-3jM9GxGZ4Qd80Fezb2URmS27CiTKxjbX5zS60H7bdmgrl5ItI3LRUrvn66O62WYmhLVhcXc26rUyPNVimzz3suWyijVMpUvvU6RWHk-kHTD9r1Yz14dFpl8fdSU2jj0EWfCRGnMGQ6ARV_vpF2Sf_hVzOuBQOU%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

The election is over, and -- as Governor Holcomb said on election night -- _**we’re just getting started. **_

Here in Indiana, since 2017 we’ve set records. Records for attracting high wage jobs. Record investments in education. Records for helping Hoosiers skill-up. Records for infrastructure investments, records for adoptions from foster care, and so much more.

There’s no question that as we continue to fight this pandemic there are still big challenges ahead of us as Hoosiers -- but together, _we know that our best days are yet to come._

**That’s because Hoosiers are tough. Hoosiers are resilient. And Hoosiers stick together. **

And that’s why we’re writing to you today. The election is over -- but the mission of building One Indiana for All continues. There are still more records to set and so many more opportunities to build for all Hoosiers.

And while we’ve got the strong leadership we need in Governor Holcomb, we still need you in the game to help us take that next step.

That’s why we’re reaching out right now and asking our grassroots to chip in just **[$5](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d853e94e7576420e9f20f730c44baa76&_e=O_H1HcWEIviD4Km6kgz8tVSEB1pP8EUqRB1u_lKJxpgYDFy9gNf6sDsHtSq7mbg75HA5rqZwVsn556efurY3CDLdnuNFy_GC1bUd9Y06G34T7uoGV3DusdPEd307AbJadPafIIppBdmOYEY4NdkoSiGUJjGhFeaEOdssuTj33FUifc_AJNqU27dYXYU1D_EJorWbwwe4AeewrO4orizDlOh86cty3I7JEUwIBRlJ8Ptq_UaRBU7Crq8SPFUZhERSDukTeQ1zee9PLiHp3KDphzwQyls3hBKqbP7WsfmAva-ZD6ihIF5agEoGkD2sXPYNW4tSpGCX-WVLXhlRf5OVPwBvqE5GdfPjmmljgLCPwJjbUczJUVsTMkr9E8FufxWbZZBD-EIHkk54fKEsQwBlR_nT5REWe_dqcpTozu1NkCziVI1gy5Udu9sGZDO7-y1NgmM1HF8-alpSyi1Nimeo9U15cjGQTeh0nWju0kdTRp7d6IrycHkmZ79QC4jT-6qG)** to end the month strong.

Your contribution helps us keep you updated -- here through email, on social media, through videos, and so much more. And it helps keep the records rolling for Hoosiers.
[**Donate $5**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=d853e94e7576420e9f20f730c44baa76&_e=O_H1HcWEIviD4Km6kgz8tVSEB1pP8EUqRB1u_lKJxpgYDFy9gNf6sDsHtSq7mbg75HA5rqZwVsn556efurY3CDLdnuNFy_GC1bUd9Y06G34T7uoGV3DusdPEd307AbJadPafIIppBdmOYEY4NdkoSiGUJjGhFeaEOdssuTj33FUifc_AJNqU27dYXYU1D_EJorWbwwe4AeewrO4orizDlOh86cty3I7JEUwIBRlJ8Ptq_UaRBU7Crq8SPFUZhERSDukTeQ1zee9PLiHp3KDph5dxozhniUgPr2ez8r0cMcVFM8lymFhpIMZJ4DTk9uPFvqOc2xYt49QwRHZhw4XgQdOVkV3rLzDQxqOUaY21URyiRUX7Cwh6wDclEQGhQ1BAxQpP-_bQsM_9SiYWv9krlPa9kkxms8FrmzuKkLg9wOho1d2tjZTSw32AmS0yEWhK5VFo9F_DOBJZ2REfxXVsSFsm-hS-GQsEEP5Rb-92f5Ly73S1uO10WQYSmOLUevfL)
Thank you for your support, and for your teamwork -
\- Your Holcomb Crew

It’s not going to be easy and that’s why we’re reaching out to our most dedicated grassroots supporters to help make this project a success. Friend, Midnight tonight – that’s the deadline to contribute to our recently-launched, limited-time **[Conservative Values Defense Fund](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=a239b705de0a4532ac34946a9bd6910e&_e=uhEAUmQXM3r9NGUBEkMrYt1tkrvxkbdF0MnaksP2j_TwjRuMp7j8A39ni_XaFu84RnOk-CBQ7qW-yol-qLiWUNESxxD1V8d_jfWg_s8cekHpoGIBekoS5HywSddzxw6jLTU74O1MKCUfoo5ZBwjC9y0fjftBU3RpEmGdSQspEhw1BfolqZavcvAq9eauGZhNuwepQ-UP9N1dWxkoYgNmqqisc-iIoMnasE7YwcRjCR6ZyIuAICTt3kuaCg-GFQN09JjEbGKYEh-O9SpmkAT4Yo3bZTtJH_kBkAX744ygVzioi3gCbjDPFzfp1RI-DLHMB46h3y193uOFtkJCFnal-YV2kX7HynrPn4WrjhICK_PWBUqHjp9GhAB8S5TnPIOk3f9TKX4PfOPJfsFsWNOoYokraHRhqvAfgzTIHe5MZL3ZxsTZdKWYFm-J8dl-XUYAkQ0NbaQggZtsauT3sIXD5PgsAw9xm3w_tWkOOrSL_Xg%3D)** – and we want to make sure that you don’t miss this chance to be a part of something major. Democrats are preparing to fight harder than ever to advance their liberal agenda at the expense of our values, our freedoms, and even our livelihoods – and we launched this project to make sure that Darin has everything it’s going to take to fight back when it counts the most. **It’s not going to be easy and that’s why we’re reaching out to our most dedicated grassroots supporters to help make this project a success.** _If you believe in Darin’s mission to protect conservative values for future generations of Americans to enjoy, please don’t miss this opportunity to defend them while we can, friend._ [**JOIN THE CONSERVATIVE VALUES DEFENSE FUND**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=a239b705de0a4532ac34946a9bd6910e&_e=uhEAUmQXM3r9NGUBEkMrYt1tkrvxkbdF0MnaksP2j_TwjRuMp7j8A39ni_XaFu84RnOk-CBQ7qW-yol-qLiWUNESxxD1V8d_jfWg_s8cekHpoGIBekoS5HywSddzxw6jLTU74O1MKCUfoo5ZBwjC9y0fjftBU3RpEmGdSQspEhw1BfolqZavcvAq9eauGZhNuwepQ-UP9N1dWxkoYgNmqqisc-iIoMnasE7YwcRjCR6ZyIuAICTt3kuaCg-GFQN09JjEbGKYEh-O9SpmkAT4YpPjMd2JE6c3c8ut6GVrOMvRaLcvxxr9LfqIr2kBt96noadT3Z0pnXH-Whn8AFrrO8kqvSeIo5VPQ6aLE7JOCFaFsOgBt556vGKD-ZI0f_CrqKm_FY7w8aRS1atfia-M39oIH00lvcoxNW3Ah9iDi5jgbMuBgtl-RnidnmtxG1xHj7JZ2heTQHBu5WgxA-i4fos7C_wK-BPR7mEMccYZo1s%3D) Thank you, Team LaHood **\- - - Forwarded Message Below - - -**

Friend,

We’re doing something a little different as we close out this month and we want to make sure that you got a chance to contribute to our new project: **[the Conservative Values Defense Fund.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=a239b705de0a4532ac34946a9bd6910e&_e=uhEAUmQXM3r9NGUBEkMrYt1tkrvxkbdF0MnaksP2j_TwjRuMp7j8A39ni_XaFu84RnOk-CBQ7qW-yol-qLiWUNESxxD1V8d_jfWg_s8cekHpoGIBekoS5HywSddzxw6jLTU74O1MKCUfoo5ZBwjC9y0fjftBU3RpEmGdSQspEhw1BfolqZavcvAq9eauGZhNuwepQ-UP9N1dWxkoYgNmqqisc-iIoMnasE7YwcRjCR6ZyIuAICTt3kuaCg-GFQN09JjEbGKYEh-O9SpmkAT4YughOHbY1sMvHgGVpJh_TQSVeUNgB6EN_afGu7aRGNZ4CtiB15GyUI_7duwSTKze23Vp-ZzW0FP73rG-N0LFdycVB29nMC2OmnUdm4JkNuDJjOkzktuw21KFlG3tOAlbXPYdN0pdq5jmins6eoWh19ExNPTR9OgkJYTAVScFgL9eDVmx9DrIqTpJxhjDLrzopa7TJTYc2mJ3C7U0BSKDZ5I%3D)**

_This project is critical to Darin’s mission to promote and protect the values which matter the most to us and to future generations of Americans._
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=a239b705de0a4532ac34946a9bd6910e&_e=uhEAUmQXM3r9NGUBEkMrYt1tkrvxkbdF0MnaksP2j_TwjRuMp7j8A39ni_XaFu84RnOk-CBQ7qW-yol-qLiWUNESxxD1V8d_jfWg_s8cekHpoGIBekoS5HywSddzxw6jLTU74O1MKCUfoo5ZBwjC9y0fjftBU3RpEmGdSQspEhw1BfolqZavcvAq9eauGZhNuwepQ-UP9N1dWxkoYgNmqqisc-iIoMnasE7YwcRjCR6ZyIuAICTt3kuaCg-GFQN09JjEbGKYEh-O9SpmkAT4Yg9iO-PRJPKmpWjBdO5sOGpAnpIyQOioWn4rB9Bo_KCI-dD403K0kGS0fGZeXF_RQBqhXu-bQN11HeA-2DWd3LGSd4nLSq745Om0SytazVvovP1n3wNZUJ8fSHnh_vTMkA8PNp2EIjkeGfxpefRHYtt_Vuigl2ryjOzb_2dAK0AiE0vg-kvSXkd2HN9UIIV-8AktNDMXFsteqS6xXKBjZGw%3D)
Friend, we need to prove to Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and AOC right now that conservatives aren’t going to sit on the sidelines while they push for radical policies like the Green New Deal and socialized healthcare.

They’re only holding onto a slim House majority after Election Day and all the momentum is shifting in our favor – meaning now is the time to fight harder for strong borders, a strong economic recovery that puts the people first, and every other item on the America-First agenda.

_That’s the last thing that they want to see happen in the coming weeks and months, friend – but Darin is going to fight harder than ever to deliver the results that America needs right now._

**[We’re only accepting contributions to this fund until midnight on November 30th. Friend, Midnight tonight – that’s the deadline to contribute to our recently-launched, limited-time – and we want to make sure that you don’t miss this chance to be a part of something major. Democrats are preparing to fight harder than ever to advance their liberal agenda at the expense of our values, our freedoms, and even our livelihoods – and we launched this project to make sure that Darin has everything it’s going to take to fight back when it counts the most. It’s not going to be easy and that’s why we’re reaching out to our most dedicated grassroots supporters to help make this project a success. Friend, we need to prove to Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and AOC right now that conservatives aren’t going to sit on the sidelines while they push for radical policies like the Green New Deal and socialized healthcare. They’re only holding onto a slim House majority after Election Day and all the momentum is shifting in our favor – meaning now is the time to fight harder for strong borders, a strong economic recovery that puts the people first, and every other item on the America-First agenda. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Sign up to help with Georgia runoff elections & more! Week of November 30th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
Hold your ground and keep fighting! President Trump has taken so many arrows for us over the last four years, and now it’s our turn to stand up for him. Don’t give up!
|
---
GET OUT THE VOTE TO KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY
The Georgia Senate runoff elections are coming up fast, and there’s not a lot of time to turn out the vote. Yet again, as with the Presidential election, hundreds of thousands of mail-in ballots are being sent out now, which means that our side cannot afford to leave any vote behind.

Please sign up below to help Get Out The Vote for both of the Senate seats in Georgia. If Democrats are willing to steal a Presidential election, don’t you think they’re willing to steal a Senate majority? We need all hands on deck, so please sign up to help and share the sign-up form with everyone you know who might want to help too!
[SECURE THE SENATE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZngwNlZIVGJFRkZBTE41TGVsUHc1SFBiSnZqdS1QN19kZ3BOTTNHeUdLOTU4eWJRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzA1NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=qpXGRoGmtSEtDyhz-u1JbA)
|
---
President Trump has spent the last 4 years working tirelessly for the American people, and now, in the midst of continued election uncertainty, the American people are working tirelessly for him! Rallies are still happening all over the nation to #StopTheSteal, so please be sure check [StoptheSteal.us](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9wdGhlc3RlYWwudXMvP21pZD00MzA1NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=P22hxRkxBnr3W3pbnb6XgA) often to see if there is a rally happening in your state, so that you can show President Trump your support!
|
---
WATCH FOR URGENT ACTION ITEMS & UPDATES
With the litigation in so many states ongoing, most of the work is being done by attorneys at this point. However, there could be action items for the grassroots at any moment, and we will work to get those to you as soon as possible. So, be sure to keep an eye out for emails or text messages (you can sign up for text alerts by texting your email address to 404-996-1717) with updates from us.
|
---
Just as our recovery was beginning to gain traction and the American people were starting to return to some semblance of normal life, we saw local Democrat "leaders" across the country attempt to retain the “emergency” powers they illegitimately grabbed earlier this year.

Across the nation we’ve seen a spike in new restrictions, curfews, and lockdowns that have absolutely no scientific basis.

We are not fooled by their lies and fear-mongering. We see right through their vailed excuses. This has nothing to do with "slowing the spread." It's all about power.

We must stand up to the local Democrats' attempted power grab and let them know our government is by the people, for the people -- not by the elitists, over the people.

See how Americans are standing up to the tyranny all over the country! #WeWillNotComply!
* [In Buffalo, NY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9tb2JpbGUudHdpdHRlci5jb20vQU1FcmlrYU5HSVJMTEwvc3RhdHVzLzEzMzAxODMwMjYxMDY2MzgzMzk_bWlkPTQzMDU1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Wgd0rGtuAROSaWHa8R37ug)
* [In Orchard Park, NY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmFkaW8uY29tL3diZW4vbmV3cy9neW0tb3duZXItcmlwcy11cC11c2QxNWstZmluZS1saXZlLW9uLWZveC1uZXdzP21pZD00MzA1NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=xH1y59TWVSWZj3wHIqJhOA)
* [All around the country!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vdGlwc2hlZXQvYmV0aGJhdW1hbm4vMjAyMC8xMS8yNC9hbWVyaWNhbnMtYWNyb3NzLXRoZS1uYXRpb24tYXJlLXJpc2luZy11cC1hZ2FpbnN0LWRyYWNvbmlhbi1sb2NrZG93bnMtbjI1ODA0ODc_bWlkPTQzMDU1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=6qcI9DuqlsF2KVTIT15Izg)

|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of November 30th
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

This week’s civics lesson is actually for you – the parent or grandparent! Hillsdale College has dozens of videos for parents/grandparents about how to bring classical-style education to your kids/grandkids, even if they don’t attend a classical school.

The two videos we are suggesting for you are the following on teaching history to your children/grandchildren.

[Teaching History Classically | Classical Education at Home](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj10T3pnOVBUOVprayZsaXN0PVBMc1VrNTBYa1ZjQ24yOHpxdFRhaE1DeVI2dHF4WlVhUTQmaW5kZXg9MzImbWlkPTQzMDU1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xF_kKT_Lhd5ptHUUYziiMA)

[Supporting Your Child's History Education at Home | Classical Education at Home](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1PMFlHd2hQMi1kUSZsaXN0PVBMc1VrNTBYa1ZjQ24yOHpxdFRhaE1DeVI2dHF4WlVhUTQmaW5kZXg9MTImbWlkPTQzMDU1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=6ahTkQu0cjnDyNM_531_qw)

One of the problems we face as a nation today is the fact that, many decades ago, radical ideologues took control of public education in America. Over the years, they left out and twisted real history, and replaced it with fringe, false history. Leftists have also always just wanted to eliminate history generally. Think of Mao’s “Year Zero.” Socialists/communists know that they must erase history to control the future, and erasing Western Civilization history is job #1 for them.

Civics includes knowing true history, and a classical education seeks to ensure that this true history is passed down to future generations. For a good look at how today’s radical leftists are trying to erase our national history and that of Western Civilization, read this article, [“Are We Headed into Year Zero?”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1lcmljYW50aGlua2VyLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy8yMDIwLzA2L2FyZV93ZV9oZWFkZWRfaW50b195ZWFyX3plcm8uaHRtbD9taWQ9NDMwNTUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=opLTqZGwhOkO15frdbqYlg)
|
---
Just as a reminder, Giving Tuesday is coming up this Tuesday! It’s the world’s largest online giving day for nonprofits; a day where supporters can make their year-end, tax-deductible gifts.

If you would like to support Tea Party Patriots Foundation’s continued mission to educate Americans about our founding, our history, and current topics like why everyone should oppose packing the Supreme Court, we would be honored.
[SHOW YOUR SUPPORT](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm91bmRhdGlvbi9naXZpbmctdHVlc2RheS8_bWlkPTQzMDU1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=FFrIp2bCQapQoOEN0XJRsA)
|
---
In liberty,

Jenny Beth
|
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzM1LTM1ODY5NjQ1ZDMwZjRjOGM4NDU1M2FhZDhiOTQ5OGFl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kP21pZD00MzA1NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=bNPG5kAgEQCX5LJdmxEh7Q)

subject: Help us reach our goal!
body:
We need you
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wJp_ueQIwPZEXg5ocVIdIE58GKRAeCQCSz-TA-5MkuBb9ul9QESMuNMdXUWkbdrzKzAlAucmSEAw2Igr-NgUl6JNjKUN5y8zJCI_qUb0DeTw5TeytsyEBdyHw1OcQWSCZ2tTaze7pe0pBcyrbg5WeojxyXpTg5a12JTE-hVMVTI=&c=FPfVMvCgL2UCZ4NQ5k_b7Q-aXx8PIp17ENiIYYh0-hhJ3-EaSKT5Vg==&ch=djEjJB54s6bjxJES4taFTmwam9v7ynSwHc9yhKC7Es_GmPshqqp4BQ==)
---
| Patriot,
After going from homeless to the House of Representatives in under a decade, Kat Cammack is ready to put in the work and serve the great people of FL-03 as our Congresswoman-elect.
Kat's prepared to fight for the working families of Florida and preserve our rights and freedom, but she can't take on this mission alone!
Reaching the end-of-month fundraising goal that we're approaching tonight will be crucial to keeping up the fight for conservative values in our district. body:
A postmortem of the Texas US Congressional Race bloodbath.
I am so grateful.
Friends,
I will be doing a data deep dive into all ten targeted Texas U.S. Congressional races to show what we have learned and what we must do to win Texas.
**Watch live at:** twitch.tv/donnaimamtx
**When:** Thursday, Dec 3 at 8 PM Central Time
To ask live questions join the chat room. To join the chat room you need to create a free account on twitch.

**Sign up at donnaimam.com to get a calendar invite.**

Donna Imam
Donna Imam is the 2020 TX31 US Congress nominee. Donna started her tech career as the first female design engineer ever hired in the 100 year history of Duncan Metering. Since then she's led billion dollar product lines, from computers used by millions worldwide, to microprocessors found in everything from washing machines to commercial jets. Her campaign platform is simple. It rebuilds the crumbling foundation of this country. It lifts up every American - the people who work every day and carry America on their shoulders - so we can all flourish together, continue to innovate, and lead economically.

Donna started her tech career as the first female design engineer ever hired in the 100 year history of Duncan Metering. Since then she's led billion dollar product lines, from computers used by millions worldwide, to microprocessors found in everything from washing machines to commercial jets. Her campaign platform is simple. It rebuilds the crumbling foundation of this country. It lifts up every American - the people who work every day and carry America on their shoulders - so we can all flourish together, continue to innovate, and lead economically. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: 9 changes to help Rhode Islanders get tested
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Rhode Island is a national leader in COVID-19 testing, but we're always working to improve our testing systems. The demand for testing is at an all-time high and we need to adapt to handle that level of activity. So, over the next few weeks, we're making nine major changes to our testing system:

1. Last week, we launched a new texting system to let people know that their test results are available at [portal.ri.gov/results](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018erPX1X4Q4pXgC4DV_rw0uxgsEJ9ePGTJF9X_EjKjPuuSy3gbhX9rNatX5U-ZWda-EO-5wo98rkduaqzozPLGxJQS_o9v2YwlW2nxM2CkN2XZi-a-3z6cH3g1Xf8gve8YvzW8KbOZz3uTmMK4EEYDw==&c=peMdHwDydvGA-afN87pTEwzWYSi5wuIRfW2rJHPu-AgGS0jPa0arrA==&ch=mXDT3vkTsn_vC_hkjMc8PKk6y-k61xi2jyThhWwW3G4jS0hTMQI9nQ==). Going forward, if you provide your cell phone number when you sign up to get tested, you'll receive a text message as soon as your results are available on the portal.
2. Over the next week, we are dramatically scaling up our daily testing volume, with the goal of doubling the number of state-run tests by the end of our two-week pause.
3. To ensure people with symptoms can get tested quickly, we're going to be reserving 3,000 daily tests for people with symptoms on the portal at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018erPX1X4Q4pXgC4DV_rw0uxgsEJ9ePGTJF9X_EjKjPuuSy3gbhX9rHRh7kSdRocqZN3an2eVANpV7XK6lHyKEcUjgQzGzJDoGx6HjtJEYpmT_Az5yAtiNBoax7vI2_vSi0Re_KVN5tc=&c=peMdHwDydvGA-afN87pTEwzWYSi5wuIRfW2rJHPu-AgGS0jPa0arrA==&ch=mXDT3vkTsn_vC_hkjMc8PKk6y-k61xi2jyThhWwW3G4jS0hTMQI9nQ==).
4. Starting December 2, all asymptomatic Rhode Islanders can get tested through the portal - you no longer need to belong to a certain age group or industry to qualify.
5. We're deploying our new BinaxNOW tests across the state, which doesn't require much equipment and can process results in as little as 15 minutes.
6. We're also adding more testing sites. This week, we're opening a new, asymptomatic-only testing site at the Dunkin Donuts center. And we're scaling up that site over the next few weeks until it has the capacity to run 5,000 daily BinaxNOW tests.
7. We're using these new tests to do targeted testing in high-density communities. Last week, we launched a pilot program in Central Falls and will soon have the capacity to run 1,000 daily tests for anyone in the city community, regardless of symptoms.
8. Starting next week, we're going to run cyclical tests with BinaxNOW for health care workers, teachers and students at select schools, and first responders.
9. Over the next month, we'll be partnering with the Broad Institute and CIC Health to enable businesses to easily order and conduct tests for their employees.

We're always working to build a more comprehensive, faster testing network to ensure all Rhode Islanders can easily get a test and access their results. Please, keep getting tested regularly to protect yourself and your loved ones. We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018erPX1X4Q4pXgC4DV_rw0uxgsEJ9ePGTJF9X_EjKjPuuSy3gbhX9rNCkAwXRdfhzuAslwpK_4ryWYXGak_SyJSA_I6YZo6teb0dlzyVHkQBHP2WBJGcDf3Dp7ewNE1bhLkFprsmFsub1Q9YPLjvGHm_WDYHprgqq-S-c5MSU2OcTrccHZNoVbpaCva3rB4udYNJzGMPdPfjsX_em2r20ONB7KGwNJjhv-Z_VZepRLarKTB3V6KtBmlS8A6dPfRfcxMG8wcln3yKXogTe-YL0ZYa9QkxE5neMjMogaTeeiBs8TgMb63ZDDBvPgZ3BBy5qc2OOYub3UeQ=&c=peMdHwDydvGA-afN87pTEwzWYSi5wuIRfW2rJHPu-AgGS0jPa0arrA==&ch=mXDT3vkTsn_vC_hkjMc8PKk6y-k61xi2jyThhWwW3G4jS0hTMQI9nQ==).
---
|
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

That’s right – this isn’t a margin of thousands or even hundreds of votes but a mere 12 votes. That is why the fight for NY-22 continues on. **When 1 or 2 ballots could make the difference in this race, we can’t stop fighting for fairness and transparency in the counting of ballots until we know for sure that we won.** _**[Can I count on you to help us get to the finish line?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=f59b70ac43134d468492c28a72f878d0&_e=6KfX_M3giQaCBUUNJLSdyB9mBJORTkSlHXDsQb_zsqPI1pxFn_ChcSWieHs3LfO2eBM18yAioMQFmXkG6kMAC-PxkMCEvN6LDQLIAvCOQCx9SDYrHE26ptVxSXoE5J3msfvnXZFbtGSysYFZupFJEMhUMbx3BBheDPwvESh8T-JYGp--y-Tcu7GKA9mcQDLSNVX9eLq9vk6bHhWOt9fHur9sGxwmfX7Fwx5Bahz5kEmknwNZqbjHpOrnwtmA7iwhwkUAdqEfjw7aT-EaOlPnMQVEX8snuA8IrUWjbLzPd9x6GGYVr6wjKkI5az-HEfL7oLvoI6otRw8jfPLfp_m-AHYW1_H2i1In6t9o4R7GuRuF0ayrWQbNe9lU-qfnWrNPYfx_eT4Z9TbbfmjkP6lIoAHL1hgkxmPZH6ipNBulWeFGZiIA_suF0i_cKsW2jFO9QxT-xa3SivKiGg_L4riSpnrEmM6XdnpiUTqxVeKwnNk%3D)**_ Friend, we knew at the start of this campaign that winning wouldn’t be easy. We knew that unimaginable challenges would come our way and that we would have to be ready to go the extra mile at all times in order to take back our district. Now is one of those extraordinary times, and I need you by my side. **[Can you rush a donation to help us ensure every legal vote is clean_body: When 1 or 2 ballots could make the difference in this race, we can’t stop fighting for fairness and transparency. THE FIGHT FOR NY-22 ISN'T OVER! We're in a fight for every legal vote. Friend, The race for NY-22 has come down to a razor-thin margin: only 12 votes separate Anthony Brindisi and I. That’s right – this isn’t a margin of thousands or even hundreds of votes but a mere 12 votes. That is why the fight for NY-22 continues on. When 1 or 2 ballots could make the difference in this race, we can’t stop fighting for fairness and transparency in the counting of ballots until we know for sure that we won. Friend, we knew at the start of this campaign that winning wouldn’t be easy. We knew that unimaginable challenges would come our way and that we would have to be ready to go the extra mile at all times in order to take back our district. Now is one of those extraordinary times, and I need you by my side. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. I can’t thank you enough for sticking with us every step of the way. name: Team Warner
subject: Georgia is on our minds.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
There's still a chance to flip the Senate.
|
---

| |
Hi Derek --

We're reaching out because our friends Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock still need your help to win **_both_** Senate races in Georgia and help Democrats take control of the Senate.

There's a lot at stake: Winning these two runoff elections means that Democrats regain control of the Senate. With Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House and a democratic majority in the House, retaking the Senate means we can make real progress to make health care affordable, get Americans the resources they need during the pandemic, and build an economy that works for everyone.

But the GOP also knows what's on the line -- and they're funneling millions of dollars into Georgia to keep control of the Senate.

That's why we're reaching out today, Derek: We need your help to bring home a win in Georgia and keep our country moving forward.

**[So please, if you have the means, help us turn the tide in Georgia and flip the Senate by splitting a donation between Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d98b/53d9897e/55066a28/1c88d34e/2333922358/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk0NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ga?refcode=20201130_f_1_nd__946__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support! We can win this.

-- Team Warner
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d98b/53d9897e/55066a28/1c88d34d/2333922358/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk0NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ga?refcode=20201130_f_1_nd__946__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: Christy Smith
subject: Hi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Here's a quick rundown of where we are in this race:
* _**CA-25 is the closest race in the nation**_ , with **only 405 votes** separating me from Mike Garcia.
* There are still **hundreds of votes** that need to be counted.
* This is the _only_ House race left in the nation where we could flip a seat from red to blue -- and unseat a Republican incumbent while we do it.

With margins this tight, it's increasingly likely that this race will go to a recount -- which is why I'm asking for your help.

We need to meet our recount fund goal of $225,000 so we can cover the cost of our legal team -- and fight for every voter to be heard in this close race. **But right now, we're still short of our goal.**

**[Peter, you've brought me this far. Now, will you help in this final stretch by pitching in $5 or any amount to our recount fund right now, so we can make sure every voice in CA-25 is heard in this election?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bec9/29776869/8238685/569d51de/1954180580/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMzBfcmVjb3VudDM0X2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201130_recount34_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bec9/29776869/8238685/569d51df/1954180580/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMzBfcmVjb3VudDM0X2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201130_recount34_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bec9/29776869/8238685/569d51d8/1954180580/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMzBfcmVjb3VudDM0X2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201130_recount34_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")

name: Lt Col Wendy Rogers
subject: Stop them from stealing GA!
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Hi Peter,

I am Senator-Elect Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret). I was one of the first women to earn her wings in the Air Force, and was recently elected an Arizona state senator in one of the most expensive Arizona state senate races ever.

Now, I am working to stop the radical Democrats from stealing the two U.S. Senate seats in Georgia- and for that

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ
, I need you to get our MAGA candidates some help

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ
!

I know what it is to take on big Soros and Bloomberg money and win. It's not easy, and it takes a real team effort.

Soros and outside liberal groups dumped nearly $2.5 million on my race- and that was for STATE SENATE. Now, I won anyway, because I worked hard and campaigned with the President.

But right now, Soros and Bloomberg are dumping millions into Georgia - with the U.S. Senate on the line!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

I know first hand..... the far-Left billionaires are relentless. Every time I outraised my liberal opponent, they would dump hundreds of thousands more into the race to prop her up.

Ultimately, I prevailed. But it wasn't easy! And right now, our fellow MAGA warriors, Kelly Loeffler and David Purdue, need our help to stop Chuck Schumer from gaining control of the Senate!

The Republicans need both seats to keep the Senate. And our guys need air support! That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Drain the DC Swamp PAC.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Do you understand what's at stake here?

Your gun rights, as you know them, will be out the door, maybe forever, if we lose these races!

Soros, Hollywood, Bloomberg, and other far-left crazies are dumping millions into this election. That means we must meet his challenge.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Gun owners knew it was coming. Mike Bloomberg poured tens of millions of dollars into races all across America this election cycle and got very little to show for it on election night. No states flipped blue, and what’s more, he didn’t even swing a single state’s House or Senate blue.

But with the two Senate runoff races in Georgia still up in the air, Bloomberg wants to make his investment pay off, after all.

Everytown for Gun Safety, a Bloomberg funded organization, has loudly endorsed the anti-gun Democrat candidate Jon Ossoff. Ossoff faces Republican Senator David Perdue in a runoff race set for January 5th.

As gun owners across the country know, the two Senate races in Georgia were both too close to call on election night. And while that matters to Georgians, it matters to every American because the outcome of those two races will determine which party controls the United States Senate.

If the Democrats take those two seats, the United States Senate will be divided 50 to 50 with the tie breaking vote going to the Vice President. Of course, the left assumes that Vice President is going to be Kamala Harris. The right can’t take the chance that they’re right.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Drain the DC Swamp PAC gives support and cover for conservatives in tough races. They support the fighters among us! We are grateful for them!

We need to win TWO Senate races there to fend him off. Can you help?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

We can't let the Dems have full control again. We just can't. Last time was a disaster!

It may be that our last chance to stop Schumer from having control of the Senate!

We MUST win two of two races there. The stakes couldn't be higher. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ
- that these Senate seats will not be bought!

Join the President, the Georgia Senators and me in fighting back against Soros and Bloomberg! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ
, for America!

America First,

Image

secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1

Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)

Republican Arizona Senate Senator-elect

Pro-Constitution, Conservative, Tough on Illegal Immigration

Arizona's 6th Legislative District

P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=ixn98ZFZRrcqI4c&b=A5rJvGi4jj9BJPAXWeCHCQ
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:
https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwcTIzs7JwM

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Thank you
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

With all 24 counties completing their recounts and the Iowa Executive Council certifying the election, the final results show we are victorious!
---
| [Donate Now](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=b6e969868a&e=16fac31a0f "Donate Now")
---
| | | While the race is extraordinarily close, I am proud to have won this election. It is the honor of a lifetime to be elected to serve the people of eastern and southern Iowa. Iowans are tenacious, optimistic, and hard-working, and I will take those same attributes to Washington, D.C., on their behalf.

>From 24 years of service to our country in the U.S. Army and Army Reserves to my several decades of protecting the health of Iowans as a medical professional, I will bring that same Iowa grit to Congress by working to strengthen our healthcare system, combat the COVID pandemic, and get Iowans safely back to work and school.

Thank you for your continued support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks
---
| [ ](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=7b19f103e3&e=16fac31a0f)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: First Lady unveils 2020 Christmas decorations!
body:
First Lady Melania Trump unveiled the official Christmas theme and decorations this morning as the First Family prepares... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bf8170294&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 30, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: First Lady unveils 2020 Christmas decorations!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fab36b5d6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **First Lady Melania Trump** unveiled the official Christmas theme and decorations this morning as the First Family prepares for Christmastime at the White House.

**This year’s theme** , “America the Beautiful,” pays tribute to the majesty of our great country. From the traditional Gold Star Family Tree to a gingerbread house replica of the White House—complete with the West Wing, Executive Residence, East Wing, Rose Garden, and First Ladies’ Garden—crafted from 275 pounds of dough, every piece of this year’s décor was chosen and completed with care.

**📷**[**IN PHOTOS: ‘America the Beautiful’ Christmas at the White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c86c645030&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Over the past four years** I have had the honor to travel to some of our nation’s most beautiful landmarks and meet some of the most compassionate and patriotic American citizens,” the First Lady said. “From coast to coast, the bond that all Americans share is an appreciation for our traditions, values, and history, which were the inspiration behind the decorations this year.”

**The official White House Christmas tree** arrived last week, courtesy of Dan Taylor from Dan and Bryan Trees. Greeted by the First Lady, Taylor presented an 18.5’ Fraser Fir, which was delivered to the White House North Portico in a horse-drawn carriage.

**“Thank you to all of the staff and volunteers** who worked to make sure the People’s House was ready for the holiday season,” the First Lady said. “Wishing everyone a Merry Christmas and a happy and healthy New Year.”

**🎬 **[**The official Christmas tree arrives at the White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d64d8e540&e=3ee4985eea)

🎄 [**First Lady Melania Trump unveils 2020 Christmas décor**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f4471ea06&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: First Lady Melania Trump unveiled the official Christmas theme and decorations this morning as the First Family prepares... | | | | | The White House • November 30, 2020 | | | WATCH: First Lady unveils 2020 Christmas decorations! | | First Lady Melania Trump unveiled the official Christmas theme and decorations this morning as the First Family prepares for Christmastime at the White House. This year’s theme , “America the Beautiful,” pays tribute to the majesty of our great country. From the traditional Gold Star Family Tree to a gingerbread house replica of the White House—complete with the West Wing, Executive Residence, East Wing, Rose Garden, and First Ladies’ Garden—crafted from 275 pounds of dough, every piece of this year’s décor was chosen and completed with care. 📷 “Over the past four years I have had the honor to travel to some of our nation’s most beautiful landmarks and meet some of the most compassionate and patriotic American citizens,” the First Lady said. “From coast to coast, the bond that all Americans share is an appreciation for our traditions, values, and history, which were the inspiration behind the decorations this year.” The official White House Christmas tree arrived last week, courtesy of Dan Taylor from Dan and Bryan Trees. Greeted by the First Lady, Taylor presented an 18.5’ Fraser Fir, which was delivered to the White House North Portico in a horse-drawn carriage. “Thank you to all of the staff and volunteers who worked to make sure the People’s House was ready for the holiday season,” the First Lady said. “Wishing everyone a Merry Christmas and a happy and healthy New Year.” 🎬 🎄 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body:
Fellow American, It all starts out the same... Socialists promise utopia and deliver hell. They pit us against one another, and tell the people with less that the only way they’ll ever have more is if they rely on the government to take it for them. They say they’ll “fight for equality.” They say they’ll stick up for the little guy, and stand up to corporations and billionaires. _**But that’s never how it goes.**_ Just ask Venezuela, Cuba or Eastern Europe. Matter of fact, just ask California or New York -- where Americans are fleeing by the thousands. New York’s radical socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said it herself: she’s putting everything she has into flipping Georgia so she “doesn’t have to negotiate with Republicans.” **I want to make this clear: Georgia is all that’s standing between America and socialism.** And unless you act now, AOC will succeed. The radical Left used so-called “moderates” like Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as their Trojan horse, and if they successfully steal the presidency AND the Senate, the Biden Harris administration will sign every last piece of legislation she puts on their desk. **[So don’t wait — donate $35 or more to help us re-elect Kelly Loeffler, save the Senate, and give our country a fighting chance against socialism.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b7ef6298f2c4d4490c42fa4ad68c410&_e=v_Usa_7RxtuU-dAQJfeNr5z3ASdoq_0x814tM3NKxJqgICkNShhqUT1lgw_wusUIDnFJViJYZNK0nM19Ei9oY-qJC-cyfNCSVXLZOmGm61HMyGX9SzwopsUc6CXYCLMfMAJC9VV93XC4vbBeELI-ZLWOIMWTGNsshK_VKyOe5ONb7Ln-u7MIn1VbGnfIL28s3h3l6wciAyez2Fym_gebKvwIN_ZW_ACjvb4l9_QhH7-FT-xDF2pYgmHHKAgzDI9yvt43l7adt_py6dBnyZ9OYIAVSZlBhsdGR6BgBG8FR6K1-LeCAohPjYe_RC1EIjqi)** The truth is there’s nothing a socialist won’t steal. _They’ll steal from mom and pop shops and call it “protesting.”_ _They’ll steal over half your paycheck without batting an eye, and claim you still aren’t paying your “fair share.”_ __And if we let them, they’ll steal this entire election.__ They don’t have the same moral compasses that you and I have. They don’t care who they have to lie to or what they have to destroy as long as they get what they want in the end. That’s why I need your help today. **[I’m counting on patriots like you to rush in your donations and help the Made in America team HOLD THE LINE in Georgia.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b7ef6298f2c4d4490c42fa4ad68c410&_e=v_Usa_7RxtuU-dAQJfeNr5z3ASdoq_0x814tM3NKxJqgICkNShhqUT1lgw_wusUIDnFJViJYZNK0nM19Ei9oY-qJC-cyfNCSVXLZOmGm61ENDVaSHfgcrUuhqUnBtNdfAchgefeqk0lTA9CDm2zxAbJpPMmTlLFyRBsnm5ebHRhl2Ullz9mAV6Ra65yBXDGe5IL0CZQIkYmmGUmvhiRSC0-0x1hJ6jbGO10M-8TzdMWTC3j-8RYZUlqypXcAIag5LTgZqH9hcyGwxeTbc6gvC5yfYY0RQ10dcMvwvf837KU_NkvzUAKjG70yXBqQr7fs)** AOC said it herself: she doesn’t care about finding common ground, or meeting in the middle. She wants full fledged socialism, and she won’t stop until she gets it. **Unless you want it too, you must take action.** **[Please donate $35 or more today to help the Made in America team re-elect Kelly Loeffler, save the Senate, and defeat socialism not just in Georgia, but the United States of America.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b7ef6298f2c4d4490c42fa4ad68c410&_e=v_Usa_7RxtuU-dAQJfeNr5z3ASdoq_0x814tM3NKxJqgICkNShhqUT1lgw_wusUIDnFJViJYZNK0nM19Ei9oY-qJC-cyfNCSVXLZOmGm61EPqcZ0eIhUQjaMvnoa1eFVStFZ3V-XjlGZxGolbeiWz6Zja6nhDwGJkfUkNEwTpAbzUytlFurVpcxTgqhNkr0We9Vk6wqPFm-lwQtghQ08ICtYgDvk8tD3ju0-xUxPT4_G2UeVsYJgDfn425n6fKUJ-a9C9RGIrYiCalWiEZAC9SON804gK6PNJo7GDGkwPrFlP3fgNrT1dCS0rjpmi3_H)** Our republic is hanging by a thread -- and that thread is Georgia. _**Georgia is all**_ that’s standing between America and open borders. _**Georgia is all**_ that’s standing between America and gun buy backs. _**Georgia is all** _that’s standing between America and a “Green New Deal.” And Georgia is all that’s standing between you and a radical Left Wing government that wants to dictate every aspect of your life. **They want our guns. They want our money. But most importantly, they want our silence.** They want us to sit down, shut up and accept their agenda. But we can’t and we won’t. **[Make your voice heard today with your dollars, and donate $35 or more to help us re-elect Kelly Loeffler and keep Georgia -- and America -- great.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b7ef6298f2c4d4490c42fa4ad68c410&_e=v_Usa_7RxtuU-dAQJfeNr5z3ASdoq_0x814tM3NKxJqgICkNShhqUT1lgw_wusUIDnFJViJYZNK0nM19Ei9oY-qJC-cyfNCSVXLZOmGm61FbTAwJKbUfqqe52eAMkP7OlU5472Az1WQDv-qBu5W8_2vyCrKLz7rbanlLAaI_0jOyizZJhe3rZXjV73Rl2I6dQ4GlAvZNhGFl2TKh9E1erKamtB2364X3h-uFPUBeMzDJHYY_UA7qJKYsM43krsBw75eFHDChalstPbL3WlHBM5M0nCAgDvhRZ4-M27a-62Ildtl3uPifZVkWEJFliA-s)** There’s too much on the line. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Monica, Kerry Washington, Justin Timberlake, and more have been added to Thursday's concert. Will I see you there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Help us get out the vote on January 5! |

[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4cf/34a064cc/1abe95f2/70223bf/2765143516/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Last week, we announced an incredible group of performers for our Rock The Runoff virtual concert this **Thursday, December 3 at 9pm EST**. I'm so excited to tell you who else we've got in the lineup! My friend **Kerry Washington** is going to be our host for the evening, and I'm thrilled to announce more performances from **Monica** , **Ludacris and Jermaine Dupri** , **Ant Clemons and Justin Timberlake** , and **Michael Stipe of R.E.M.**
[RSVP](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4cf/34a064cc/1abe95f2/70223bc/2765143516/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiRTExMzAyMDIwUlRSIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rocktherunoff?refcode=E11302020RTR") These incredible artists will join **John Legend** , **Common** , **Ben Gibbard** , **Earthgang** , and **Indigo Girls** for what is sure to be a night you won't want to miss. Tickets start at $5, and your support will help us make sure that Georgians get out to vote on January 5. Thank you for your support and I can't wait to see you on Thursday! Let's rock this runoff. -Stacey [RSVP](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4cf/34a064cc/1abe95f2/70223bc/2765143516/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiRTExMzAyMDIwUlRSIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rocktherunoff?refcode=E11302020RTR")

subject: re: fighting for NY-22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:

subject: Clinton Judge Sides with Leftist Groups to Stop Asylum Ban for Child Abusers, Drunk Drivers
body:
The government is exceeding its authority for trying to ban illegal immigrant child abusers, drunk drivers, and a series of other violent criminals from getting asylum in the United States, according to open borders groups challenging a Trump administration rule scheduled to take effect this month.

Back in August, he said he would “shut the country down” if coronavirus cases resurged. Then in September, Biden backtracked, saying, “There’s going to be no need, in my view, to be able to shut down the whole economy.” Now he has settled on the talking point that he will “follow the science,” which is a non-answer because science can diagnose the problem but cannot determine the details of public policy. Setting and implementing policy requires less following and more leading. Some have described Trump’s resistance to concede as “a threat to democracy,” but as Fitton explained in last week’s Weekly Update, Americans are facing an “an electoral coup” on the part of the Left. While they insist on the transition of power, Fitton argued that “everybody remembers what they were doing during the Obama-Trump transition. Comey was spying on Trump personally during the transition.” = ---|--- | | | | | The government is exceeding its authority for trying to ban illegal immigrant child abusers, drunk drivers, and a series of other violent criminals from getting asylum in the United States, according to open borders groups challenging a Trump administration rule scheduled to take effect this month. ---|--- | | | | == | == The Department of Justice (DOJ) should investigate “an alarming trend of racial segregation” at America’s taxpayer-funded universities, according to a pair of United States Senators who cite a number of troubling examples in a letter to Attorney General William Barr. The incidents appear to be part of a growing and increasingly powerful movement aimed at promoting diversity by somehow undoing what leftists assert is systemic racism at academic institutions in the U.S. == ---|--- | | | | = | = An ISIS terrorist indicted by a federal grand jury for providing material support to the militant Islamist group has been released by federal authorities in Oregon. Even for the famously liberal west coast it may seem unbelievable, especially since a Republican appointee heads the Department of Justice (DOJ), the agency that made the bizarre decision. = ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller Over the past four years liberals have turned normal policy debates into cancel culture vendettas. They believe that those who disagree with their political prescriptions are either venal or stupid, or more likely both. They charge without evidence that anyone who voted for Donald Trump is ipso facto racist, sexist, homophobic, other “isms” or “phobias” – and whatever other biases they have handy. The Daily Caller It has been hard to pin down exactly what prospective President Biden would do about the pandemic given the chance. Back in August, he said he would “shut the country down” if coronavirus cases resurged. Then in September, Biden backtracked, saying, “There’s going to be no need, in my view, to be able to shut down the whole economy.” Now he has settled on the talking point that he will “follow the science,” which is a non-answer because science can diagnose the problem but cannot determine the details of public policy.
